rows.text: Doubled down on efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts, leveraging strategic partnerships in markets like India and Hong Kong.
rows.source_sentence: In addition to our focus on large corporates, we doubled down on our efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts. We leveraged the work of past years including several strategic partnerships with industry leaders in markets like India and Hong Kong, and translated these into financing solutions for our SME customers.

rows.text: Almost doubled sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.
rows.source_sentence: Overall, we almost doubled our sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.

rows.text: Strengthened ESG risk management capabilities and governance, launching a new accredited training programme to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.
rows.source_sentence: Complementing all these efforts on client engagement, we also further strengthened our ESG risk management capabilities and governance. We launched a new accredited training programme to equip relationship managers and credit risk managers with the skills to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.

rows.text: Started leveraging Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.
rows.source_sentence: We started to leverage Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.

rows.text: Committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focused on providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, and granted SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.
rows.source_sentence: In 2024, we already committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focussed on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.

rows.text: The BSC discussed ESG risk assessment and management strategies and initiatives, covering climate physical and transition risks.
rows.source_sentence: • ESG risk assessment and management strategies and initiatives, covering for instance climate physical and transition risks.

rows.text: The Audit Committee (AC) and the Board Risk Management Committee (BRMC) have oversight responsibilities for sustainability-related activities.
rows.source_sentence: The Audit Committee (AC) and the Board Risk Management Committee (BRMC) also have oversight responsibilities for sustainability-related activities.

rows.text: In 2024, the BRMC discussed and reviewed climate considerations as part of the wider risk management processes.
rows.source_sentence: In 2024, the AC received regular updates on sustainability-related disclosure requirements, while the BRMC discussed and reviewed climate considerations as part of the wider risk management processes.

rows.text: Internal Audit and Legal and Compliance attend GSC meetings as observers to support a more comprehensive approach to risk management and regulatory compliance.
rows.source_sentence: Given the increasing regulatory and legal relevance of sustainability matters, Internal Audit and Legal and Compliance attend GSC meetings as observers. This supports a more comprehensive approach to risk management and regulatory compliance, and deeper ethical considerations as we navigate a dynamic and complex sustainability landscape.

rows.text: The GCC took over the Project Net Zero Steering Committee, which was project-based and intended to be transitional to operationalise the climate agenda, including net zero commitments, risk management, and reporting.
rows.source_sentence: GCC took over the Project Net Zero Steering Committee, which was project- based and intended to be transitional to operationalise our climate agenda, including net zero commitments, risk management and reporting.

rows.text: ESG Risk teams across Portfolio Analytics and ESG Credit, part of the Risk Management Group, continue to provide leadership and expertise to strengthen climate and ESG risk management capabilities.
rows.source_sentence: Beyond our governance structure, our ESG Risk teams across Portfolio Analytics and ESG Credit, which are part of the Risk Management Group, continue to provide leadership and expertise to further strengthen our climate and ESG risk management capabilities.

rows.text: Management targets cover key sustainability and climate-related themes such as governance, processes, reporting systems, climate commitments, financial inclusion, financial literacy, digital inclusion, sustainable living products and services, regenerative technology and spaces, talent retention, diversity and inclusion, employee engagement, and impact beyond banking through the DBS Foundation.
rows.source_sentence: Management targets cover key sustainability and climate- related themes such as: • Governance, processes and reporting systems • Climate and our net zero commitments, progress under Project Net Zero • Financial inclusion, financial literacy and digital inclusion • Sustainable living products and services • Regenerative technology and spaces • Talent and people, including talent retention, diversity and inclusion and employee engagement • Impact beyond banking through DBS Foundation

rows.text: We adopted a holistic approach to supporting SMEs across workforce transformation, digitalisation, sustainability and social impact.
rows.source_sentence: We adopted a holistic approach to supporting SMEs across workforce transformation, digitalisation, sustainability and social impact.

rows.text: In 2024, we began deploying funds from the upsized commitment, supporting 16 new multi-year community programmes and 22 Businesses for Impact, with a focus on meeting essential needs and fostering inclusion.
rows.source_sentence: In 2024, we began deploying funds from the upsized commitment, supporting 16 new multi-year community programmes and 22 Businesses for Impact, with a focus on meeting essential needs and fostering inclusion.

rows.text: We are committed to building and maintaining systemic resilience.
rows.source_sentence: We are committed to building and maintaining systemic resilience.

rows.text: We recognise that nature loss and the decline of biodiversity are rising concerns shared by Governments, policymakers, investors and other stakeholders.
rows.source_sentence: In addition, we recognise that nature loss and the decline of biodiversity are rising concerns shared by Governments, policymakers, investors and other stakeholders.

rows.text: We integrate the resulting material ESG factors into governance structures, risk management processes, strategy development and our reporting to stakeholders.
rows.source_sentence: Integrate the resulting material ESG factors into governance structures, risk management processes, strategy development and our reporting to stakeholders.

rows.text: We are committed to responsible banking practices by integrating sustainability into our risk management as well as the lending and financing solutions we offer our clients.
rows.source_sentence: We are committed to responsible banking practices by integrating sustainability into our risk management as well as the lending and financing solutions we offer our clients.

rows.text: The company likely addresses financed emissions through its commitment to transition finance and support for low-carbon alternatives, aligning with its broader sustainability goals.
The company likely upholds business ethics through a comprehensive code of conduct, anti-corruption policies, and whistleblowing mechanisms, ensuring ethical practices across its operations.
The company likely prioritizes data security through robust cybersecurity measures and data governance frameworks, safeguarding sensitive information and mitigating risks.
